welcomesurvey-save-confirmation-text: {{GENDER:|Jawaabahaaga}} waxay naga caawin doonaan inaan ku siino habab waxtar leh oo aad ugu bilowdo Wikipedia.
welcomesurvey-subtitle: Naga caawi inaan hagaajino {{GENDER:|khibraddaada}} Wikipedia adigoo ka jawaabaya dhowr su'aalood oo ikhtiyaari ah.
welcomesurvey-privacy-policy-link-text: Wax badan ka baro xogta ku saabsan tafatirayaasha cusub
welcomesurvey-privacy-footer-text: Mu'asasada Wikimedia waxay isticmaali doontaa {{GENDER:$1|jawaabahaaga}} si ay kaaga caawiso inaad bilowdo tafatirka {{SITENAME}}. [$2 Wax badan ka ogow bayaankayaga asturnaanta].
welcomesurvey-sidebar-editing-text: Ku dhawaad bog kasta qof walba wuu tafatiri karaa, waxaana saacad kasta la sameeyaa boqolaal isbeddel si loogu daro nuxur, loo saxo khaladaad, loona hagaajiyo akhris-fudaydka. Bogagga soo socda ayaa ku caawin kara haddii {{GENDER:$1|aad xiisaynayso}} inaad wax ku biiriso.
welcomesurvey-question-reason-option-edi: Si aad u saxdo qalad higaad ama khalad ku jira maqaalka Wikipedia
Si aad ugu darto ama u beddesho macluumaad ku jira maqaalka Wikipedia
welcomesurvey-question-reason-option-add: Si aad ugu darto sawir ama muuqaal maqaalka Wikipedia
welcomesurvey-question-reason-option-new: Si aad u abuurto maqaal cusub oo Wikipedia ah
welcomesurvey-question-reason-option-pro: Waxaan ka qaybgalayaa barnaamij, fasal, ama dhacdo
welcomesurvey-question-edited-option-no-: Maya, ma aanan ogayn inaan Wikipedia wax ka beddeli karo
welcomesurvey-question-mailinglist-label: Waxaan rabaa inaan helo talooyin iimayl ahaan ku saabsan sida loo bilaabo tafatirka.
welcomesurvey-question-mailinglist-help: Fadlan ogow in liiskan iimaylka uu ku shaqeeyo MailChimp, taas oo micnaheedu yahay in isticmaalka MailChimp ee {{GENDER:|macluumaadkaaga}} uu hoos yimaado [https://www.intuit.com/privacy/statement/ Siyaasaddooda Asturnaanta] iyo [https://mailchimp.com/legal/terms/ Shuruudaha Adeegga].
welcomesurvey-question-email-help: Waxaan ogaanay in {{GENDER:|aadan}} gelin cinwaan iimayl marka aad samaynaysay akoonkan. Waa si aad loogu talinayo, maadaama iimayl loo baahan yahay si loo soo ceshado akoonka haddii aad lumiso erayga sirta ah. FIIRO GAAR AH: Cinwaankaaga iimaylka lama muujiyo marka isticmaalayaasha kale kula soo xiriirayaan.
welcomesurvey-question-languages-label: {{SITENAME}} waxa lagu heli karaa ku dhowaad 300 luqadood. Ma jiraan luqado kale oo {{GENDER:|aad}} akhrido ama ku qorto?
welcomesurvey-question-languages-maximum: {{GENDER:|Waxaad}} gaartay tirada ugu badan ee luqadaha aad ku dari karto.
welcomesurvey-reminder: Naga caawi inaan hagaajino {{GENDER:|khibraddaada}} Wikipedia adigoo ka jawaabaya dhowr su'aalood oo ikhtiyaari ah oo ku jira Sahankeenna Soo dhaweynta. $1
welcomesurvey-mideditsignup-body: Mahadsanid tafatirka! {{GENDER:|Waxaad}} hadda arki kartaa saameynta wax ku daristaada, sidoo kalena waxaad ka heli kartaa boggaaga hore waxyaabo kale oo la soo jeediyay oo aad wax ka beddeli karto.
